headline: "AI eats software" theme is yielding a buy opportunity in this stock: Berenberg
summary: Investing.com -- Berenberg this week initiated coverage of Palo Alto Networks with a Buy rating and a $215 price target, with analyst Rahul Chopra arguing that a broad sell-off in software stocks has created an attractive entry point into one of cybersecurity’s strongest franchises.
